# Specialized Inputs (Source-extracted)

> **Tier 2 bridge.** Upstream `.ai/ui-components.md` does not yet document
> these primitives (see [`om-reference/.ai/design-system-audit-2026-04-10.md`](../../../om-reference/.ai/design-system-audit-2026-04-10.md) for the explicit "specialized inputs deferred" note). This file is generated
> from the TypeScript source until upstream lands a Specialized Inputs
> section. Tracking: `open-mercato/open-mercato#1874`.

**Source repo**: `open-mercato/open-mercato`
**Source branch**: `develop`
**Source commit**: `b39fb4dfa64ced63d78aa3aa9e17f572eb9a8137`
**Generated**: 2026-05-08

## Decision rule (when to reach for these)

| Need | Use | Notes |
|------|-----|-------|
| Multi-value selection from a known set OR free-form tags | `<TagsInput>` | `value: string[]`. Closed list when `allowCustomValues={false}`. Dictionary-backed via `loadSuggestions={async () => fetch('/api/dictionaries/<slug>/entries')}`. Replaces `<Input value="comma,separated,slugs">` antipattern. |
| Single-value with autocomplete + free-form fallback | `<ComboboxInput>` | `value: string`. Same suggestions/loadSuggestions contract as TagsInput, single-select. |
| Date selection | `<DatePicker>` | `value: Date \| null`. Use `displayFormat`/`locale` for localized format. |
| Date + time selection | `<DateTimePicker>` | Wraps DatePicker with time. |
| Cron-like event pattern | `<EventPatternInput>` | Domain-specific pattern editor. |
| Pick from `/api/events` | `<EventSelect>` | Async-loaded event names. |
| Pick from a lookup table | `<LookupSelect>` | Generic lookup-table picker. |
| Phone number with formatting | `<PhoneNumberField>` | Country-aware formatting. |
| Markdown editor with rendered preview toggle | `<SwitchableMarkdownInput>` | Toggleable rich/markdown view. |
| Time-only entry | `<TimeInput>` | Stricter than `<TimePicker>` — text input. |
| Time picker (popover) | `<TimePicker>` | Popover-based selector. |

## Anti-pattern: CSV-in-Input

`<Input value="a, b, c">` for multi-value data is **always wrong** when a closed dictionary or free-form tag list is the actual contract. Use `<TagsInput>`. DS Guardian REVIEW must flag any `<Input>` whose label or placeholder matches `/comma[- ]separated|slugs|tags/i` as **WARNING** with link to this doc.

---

### ComboboxInput

**Source**: `packages/ui/src/backend/inputs/ComboboxInput.tsx` ([upstream@b39fb4d](https://github.com/open-mercato/open-mercato/blob/b39fb4dfa64ced63d78aa3aa9e17f572eb9a8137/packages/ui/src/backend/inputs/ComboboxInput.tsx))
**Import**: `import { ComboboxInput } from '@open-mercato/ui/backend/inputs/ComboboxInput'`
**Notes**: client component

#### Exported types

```ts
export type ComboboxOption = {
  value: string
  label: string
  description?: string | null
}

export type ComboboxInputProps = {
  value: string
  onChange: (next: string) => void
  placeholder?: string
  suggestions?: Array<string | ComboboxOption>
  loadSuggestions?: (query?: string) => Promise<Array<string | ComboboxOption>>
  resolveLabel?: (value: string) => string
  resolveDescription?: (value: string) => string | null | undefined
  autoFocus?: boolean
  disabled?: boolean
  allowCustomValues?: boolean
}
```

#### Defaults (from destructuring)

- `disabled` = `false`
- `allowCustomValues` = `true`
